description_short: Rochester sits on Lake Ontario's southern shore with heavy lake-effect snow and one of the snowiest climates of any large US city.
description_long: Located on Lake Ontario in western New York, Rochester receives heavy lake-effect snow during the cold season — typically 100+ inches per year. Severe summer thunderstorms also affect the region. Monroe County is served by NWS Buffalo (office code BUF) within forecast zone NYZ003 (Monroe).
